aiDescription: Our team used various AI tools to help with development, learning, and content generation

description.part1: MeowVault is a cozy educational catalog with several games that help improve your JavaScript and TypeScript skills and prepare for technical interviews 🐾😸
description.part2: Users learn through practice and small game tasks, without stress or overload 🎮🐱
description.part3: Learning here is as soft and pleasant as a kitty supporting you with its paw before an interview 🐈💛

descriptions.alex: Nest.js backend, Prisma ORM, Supabase, JWT auth, CI/CD, GitHub Actions, Role Guards, Swagger, key-storages module, GitHub OAuth
descriptions.maria: Team Lead, Loader, User Profile (Account Settings), gradient button, Event Loop game, Wiki
descriptions.pavel: Decrypto game, Timer, Achievements service, KeyStorage service, tests
descriptions.oksana: Registration page, EyeCompass directive, Programming Cities game
descriptions.alena: Login page, Merge Game, Groq AI integration, GitHub OAuth button on frontend, Cat component
descriptions.mentor: Consultations, code review, technical leadership, owner of chain AI Kolyanych, automation of review with Kolyanych, exploring AI capabilities

components.alex: Backend API, JWT Auth, CORS, CI/CD, Prisma ORM, Supabase, GitHub Actions, Role Guards, Swagger, key-storages, GitHub OAuth
components.maria: Loader, User Profile, Account Settings, Theme Switcher, Language Switcher, gradient button, Wiki, logo
components.pavel: Decrypto game, Timer, Achievements, KeyStorage, Header, Language Switcher, Theme Switcher
components.alena: Login page, Merge Game, Groq AI, GitHub OAuth button, Cat component

aiDescriptions.chatgpt: Generated images (Alena — characters, Nadezhda — cats for Hangman), code review, test help, diary formatting
aiDescriptions.claude: Created word lists for games (Alena), diary error fixing
aiDescriptions.groq: AI integration for answer checking in Merge Game (Alena + Alexey on backend)
aiDescriptions.qwen: Generated 'smart thoughts day/night' for dev diaries, refactored Swagger decorators, documentation filling (Alexey), vibe-coding about page
aiDescriptions.codeQualityBot: Automatic PR review, code problem highlighting, chain AI JsPowWow (Sasarik)
aiDescriptions.ai: Explained Angular code (Oksana), generated project design (Maria), refactoring help
